zh.Soothill, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾素爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Soothill II於大約1245年出生在英國越可爾素爾時，他的父親Sir John de Soothill I31歲，母親Mrs. Alice De Soothill26歲。他和Sothill至少有8個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1311年在英國英格蘭越可爾素爾享年67歲。

zh-hans.Soothill, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾素爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Soothill II于大约1245年出生在英国越可爾素爾时，他的父亲Sir John de Soothill I31岁，母亲Mrs. Alice De Soothill26岁。他和Sothill至少有8个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1311年在英国英格兰越可爾素爾享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Soothill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Soothill (in Dewsbury, WR Yorks).

variants.name: Suttle
meanings: nickname from Middle English sotil, sutel ‘subtle, clever, cunning’ (Old French sotil).
habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Southwell
meanings: from Middle English south ‘south’ + wel(le) ‘well, pool, spring’ (Old English sūth + wella). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived ‘by the south well’ or ‘south of the well’, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Southwell (Nottinghamshire) or Southwell on the Isle of Portland (Dorset).
in Yorkshire and Lancashire, often a hypercorrect form of Soothill, a habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Soothill II was born about 1245, in Soothill, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John de Soothill I, was 31 and his mother, Mrs. Alice De Soothill, was 26. He had at least 8 sons and 1 daughter with Sothill. He died in 1311, in Soothill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Soothill II est né environ 1245, à Soothill, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Soothill I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Alice De Soothill, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille avec Sothill. Il est décédé en 1311, à Soothill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Soothill II um 1245 in Soothill, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Soothill I 31 und seine Mutter Mrs. Alice De Soothill 26. Er hatte mit Sothill mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1311 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Soothill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Soothill II è nato il circa 1245 nel Soothill, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Soothill I, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Alice De Soothill, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia con Sothill. Morì nel 1311, nel Soothill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.Batley, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアバトリー
ja.Sothill, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Soothill, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソオスイル
ja.lifeSummary: John de Soothill IIが約1245年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソオスイルで生まれた時，父Sir John de Soothill Iは31歳，母Mrs. Alice De Soothillは26歳であった。彼はSothillとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1311年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソオスイルで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Soothill II(이)가 대략 1245년 영국 요르크실르 소스이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Soothill I(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Alice De Soothill(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Sothill(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1311년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 소스이에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Soothill, Yorkshire, England: Soothill, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Soothill II nasceu aproximadamente 1245, em Soothill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Soothill I, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Alice De Soothill, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha com Sothill. Ele faleceu em 1311, em Soothill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Soothill II родился около 1245 г. в местности сутилл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Soothill I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Alice De Soothill, 26. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь от Sothill. Он умер в 1311 г. в местности сутилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Soothill II nació aproximadamente 1245, en Soothill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Soothill I, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mrs. Alice De Soothill, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija con Sothill. Murió en 1311, en Soothill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años.
